case_title: BIANCO & MURPHY, A PARTNERSHIP vs. CHRONOS SOFTWARE, INC., A CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIANCO & MURPHY, A PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT CHRONOS SOFTWARE, INC., A CORPORATION OLLIGEN, EVIN PETERSON, GREG DOES ONE THROUGH TEN SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-23-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-24-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-03-1993
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIANCO & MURPHY, A PARTNERSHIP SERVED OCT-25-1993, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSON, GREG
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-23-1993, CONTINUED TO JAN-07-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFENDANT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-07-1994, CONTINUED TO JUL-07-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
REQUEST FOR AND ORDER FOR EXTENTION OF TIME TIME EXTENDED TO AND INCLUDING OCTOBER 29, 1993. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIANCO & MURPHY, A PARTNERSHIP
DECLARATION OF EMILY NEWFIELD IN SUPPORT OF LIFTING STAY OF PROCEEDIN FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIANCO & MURPHY, A PARTNERSHIP
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-09-1994, CONTINUED TO DEC-09-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF TO FILE JUDGMENT BY 12-2-94. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHRONOS SOFTWARE, INC., A CORPORATION $14,247.58 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,247.58, THIS IS A JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO AN ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIANCO & MURPHY, A PARTNERSHIP
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIANCO & MURPHY, A PARTNERSHIP HEARING SET FOR NOV-08-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
CONDITIONAL NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION FILED BY DEFT. EVIN OLLINGER.
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, CALENDAR OF NOV-08-1994, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER JUDGMENT TO BE ENTERED AGAINST CHRONOS SOFTWARE ONLY.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIANCO & MURPHY, A PARTNERSHIP SERVED SEP-14-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHRONOS SOFTWARE, INC., A CORPORATION OLLIGEN, EVIN
NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS FROM BAR ASSOCIATION OF SAN FRANCISCO FILED BY DEFENDANT CHRONOS SOFTWARE, INC., A CORPORATION OLLIGEN, EVIN
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-07-1994, CONTINUED TO NOV-09-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DISMISSAL BY 11/2/94. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
